title: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control
description: On pages 13–16, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the enemy tries to regain control.
scene: The scene focuses on the enemy tries to regain control, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ah, so that's it!! I got it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Now, become my power, ski- Nokun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is my... power of science!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: MOMO... Brownbeard, stay put and watch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WH... what in the world is that

summary: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
